text: ✨ You're never studying alone! A little live counter now sits at the top of every page, showing how many fellow students are grinding through I2DL right there with you. Look up — someone's in the trenches with you right now. 💪
Easier-to-read chapter pages: numbered topics & questions, an always-visible contents sidebar that tracks where you are, and cleaner line breaks in multi-part answers and summaries.
All 12 past exams now mined (added SS20/SS21/SS22/SS24) — 512 questions; overall exam coverage 90%.
Six more exams mined (WS22, WS21, WS26, WS23, SS23, Mock) — 144 new questions, 425 total; overall coverage now 70%.
Full WS24 (Winter 2024) endterm added — 41 new questions; overall exam coverage now 41%.
Sign in with Google to sync your progress — reviewed, wrong book, notes — across devices.
Study tools: mark Reviewed, a wrong book, per-question notes, and spaced-repetition review.
Browse by exam paper (type “SS23 6.1” to jump) and concept-tag pages; AI multiple-choice added.
